info.title: My API Documentation
info.description: API documentation for my Next.js app

BearerAuth.description: Enter your JWT token from the login endpoint

access_token.description: JWT access token for API requests

refresh_token.description: Refresh token to get new access tokens

400.description: Bad request - missing or invalid credentials
Bad request - invalid input or user already exists

500.description: Server error - failed to create account

get.description: Returns category details with translations in all languages

put.description: Replaces the category photo in R2 storage

photo.description: New category photo (JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF, max 5MB)

400.description: Bad request - invalid file type or size

delete.description: Deletes a category and its photo from storage. Cannot delete if category is in use.

400.description: Cannot delete - category is in use

error.example: Cannot delete category - it is being used

get.summary: Gets all the categories by language

200.description: List of category translations for the given language, sorted by name

post.summary: Creates a new category with photo

get.summary: Gets all the favorite stories of a profile

200.description: List of favorite stories for the profile with translation for the given language

storyTranslations.description: Contains one translation for the requested language

400.description: Invalid profile ID or language ID

403.description: Forbidden - profile doesn't belong to user

400.description: Bad request - missing profile_id or story_id

200.description: Playlist with stories and their translations for the given language

storyTranslations.description: Contains one translation for the requested language

403.description: Forbidden - playlist doesn't belong to user
Forbidden - playlist doesn't belong to user

400.description: Invalid playlist ID or story ID

404.description: Playlist, story, or playlist entry not found

story_id.description: ID of the story to add

position.description: Position in playlist (optional, defaults to end)

403.description: Forbidden - playlist doesn't belong to user

get.summary: Gets all the playlists of a profile

200.description: List of playlists for the profile with story entries sorted by order

400.description: Bad request - missing fields, empty story_ids, or stories not found

get.summary: Gets all the categories of a profile

200.description: List of profile category preferences with translated names

categoryTranslations.description: Contains one translation for the requested language

400.description: Invalid profile ID or language ID

delete.description: Deletes a profile and all its associated playlists, favorites, and category preferences

date_of_birth.description: Date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format

gender.description: true for male, false for female

409.description: Profile with this name already exists for this user

get.summary: Gets all the profiles of a user
get.description: Returns all profiles associated with a specific user ID

403.description: Forbidden - cannot access other users profiles

get.summary: Gets all the categories of a story

200.description: List of categories for the story with translated names

categoryTranslations.description: Contains one translation for the requested language

get.summary: Gets a summary story translation by language

200.description: Story summary without pages (title, description, cover and duration)

get.summary: Gets a story translation by language
Gets all translations of a story

200.description: List of story translations with language info

get.summary: Gets all the stories from a category by language

200.description: List of stories in the category with translation for the given language

storyTranslations.description: Contains one translation for the requested language, sorted by title

post.summary: Create a complete story with translation and pages

400.description: Bad request - missing required fields or invalid references
